notes: Witness-parametric wrappers for Silverman III.5.5, V.1.2, III.5.3, III.5.4, II.2.10. The Isogeny.inseparableDegree def and its two main theorems (inseparableDegree_eq_one_iff_isSeparable, inseparableDegree_isPow_of_charP) are likely duplication of parallel declarations in Curves/InseparableDegree.lean for the HasseWeil.EC.Isogeny type. No sorries anywhere; no maxHeartbeats overrides.
